{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323160743C3EC8DCCE78E5A79A19B"}"},"total":117},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7274273914968441600","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常少见的游戏王降临类好书，加油","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":5,"text":"游戏王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742532635A79A19B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227274273914968441600%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227267851993727634447%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E7%8E%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693674193,"group_id":"7267851993727634447","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"死人一个","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1P+hf6clC/QOVPrRI8nqx1USjLycJb42t1sF6q3xtyw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"1283847311596381","user_name":"沙巴诗巴丹的颜柏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1283847311596381","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7267851993727634447","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：
【游戏王+卡片战斗？没有动漫剧情，孩子不懂事写着玩的。】
游鸣重生到不存在日漫的平行世界，原本平静的日常因为一场世界异变被打破。
那一天，全世界的生物脑海中突然多出了游戏王的大师规则，游戏王卡片也随机在世界各地降临。
只要捡到足够的卡牌，组成卡组，就可以进行愉快的游戏王决斗！
原本正常的世界也变成像游戏王动漫中那样的，以打牌为尊的世界。
那感情好啊！
游鸣前世可是纯正的牌佬，他岂不是可以用超前的意识打爆这群土著？
真···真的是这样吗？好像不太对吧。
为什么怪兽卡可以召唤怪兽进行战斗，魔法陷阱卡也可以在现实世界起效啊！？
还有同一系列的卡牌竟然以秘境的形式降临。
虫惑魔之森，拉比林斯的迷宫城，DT惑星世界，深渊烙印世界，星遗物世界，还有万恶的世坏。
人们可以探索秘境从而获得其中相应字段的卡牌。
于是一个闭环诞生了，打牌→下副本获取卡牌→再打牌。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o58d15192b66ba563e56ad16da5ba96f9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"游宇夜","author_id":"","book_id":"7267851993727634447","book_name":"魔卡降临，但却是游戏王","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1659人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7267852119716626959","read_count":"1659","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"300606"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.5","serial_count":"100","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o58d15192b66ba563e56ad16da5ba96f9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437263&x-signature=0bMYSLuvs9Eo%2Bf0i1c6YpGaBtBw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4257731305279773","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.863905e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323160743C3EC8DCCE78E5A79A19B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"dig
